p1_prompt_parts_json: [{"image": "https://inaturalist-open-data.s3.amazonaws.com/photos/9108809/medium.jpeg"}, "Your task is to identify if the visual feature 'flower type' is discernible in the following image. Answer only: YES, NO, or INCONCLUSIVE. Answer YES if and only if the feature is clearly discernible in the image."]
p1_parse_rule: parse_ync: startswith YES -> YES; startswith NO -> NO; contains INC -> INCONCLUSIVE; else INCONCLUSIVE
p2_parse_rule: P2 skipped because P1 was not YES; parsed as INCONCLUSIVE

p2_prompt_parts_json:
[{"image": "https://inaturalist-open-data.s3.amazonaws.com/photos/9363917/medium.jpeg"}, "Which of the following options best describes the 'flower type' of the plant in this image?
If the feature is not clearly visible, choose 'Cannot determine from this image'.

Options:", "
1. **3 Regular Parts** — What is the flower type or structure?", "
2. **4 Regular Parts** — What is the flower type or structure?", "
3. **5 Regular Parts** — What is the flower type or structure?", "
4. **6 Regular Parts** — What is the flower type or structure?", "
5. **7 or More Regular Parts** — What is the flower type or structure?", "
6. **Asters (Aster)** — What is the flower type or structure?", "
7. **Goldenrods (Solidago)** — What is the flower type or structure?", "
8. **Irregular Flowers** — What is the flower type or structure?", "
9. **Parts Indistinguishable** — What is the flower type or structure?", "
10. **Cannot determine from this image**", "
Respond with ONLY the exact option text (e.g., "3 Regular Parts") or "Cannot determine from this image"."]
p2_parse_rule: parse_mc: exact value match; else substring value match; else contains 'cannot determine' -> INCONCLUSIVE; else leading option number; else INCONCLUSIVE
